prompts.title: Noisy user report
prompts.prompt: Triage this incoming bug report and identify severity, missing reproduction details, and likely owners.
minimum_expectations: Recommend the next fastest move for the engineering team.

prompts.title: Regression candidate
prompts.prompt: Create a triage brief for a likely regression affecting a recently changed area.
minimum_expectations: Identify the likely area and the verification path.
Mention rollback or containment considerations if relevant.

prompts.title: Prioritization queue
prompts.prompt: Convert this bug report into a planning-ready triage summary with severity logic and scope of impact.
minimum_expectations: Explain severity with user impact and blast radius.
End with a recommended routing decision.
